title: Escrow address extraction accepts the first factory log with any second topic
reasoning: The parser does not check the event signature or decode the expected factory event. Any earlier factory log with an indexed address-like second topic can be treated as the escrow address, causing navigation to the wrong escrow page even though the transaction receipt is valid.
recommendation: Decode the specific escrow-created event from ESCROW_FACTORY_ABI with viem decodeEventLog, verify the event name/signature, and use the named escrow address argument rather than slicing topics generically.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests provide receipts with multiple factory logs or an unrelated indexed address before the escrow-created event.
suggestedRegressionTest: Feed the receipt parsing path a receipt containing an unrelated factory event before the actual escrow-created event and assert it routes to the address decoded from the expected event only.
minimumFixScope: Replace the topic-slicing loop with ABI-based event decoding for the expected factory creation event.
